prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical smartphone photo of a young East Asian woman with long wavy dark brown hair standing in a modern minimalist kitchen at night, photographed from about mid-thigh upward. She is centered slightly left, leaning her right hand back on the white countertop while her left hand lightly holds a lock of hair near her shoulder, facing the camera with a calm neutral expression, soft lips, natural makeup, and direct eye contact. She wears a peach fitted spaghetti-strap camisole, high-waisted dark charcoal skinny jeans with white stitching, and a delicate small gold necklace. The kitchen has glossy cream-white upper cabinets with vertical seams, a black range hood strip, a pale backsplash, a white countertop, a black gas stovetop, a covered pale green pot on the right burner, a clear plastic cooking-oil bottle at the far right, and a black built-in oven below. Use warm indoor ceiling lighting with subtle reflections on cabinets and skin, realistic phone-camera perspective, slight wide-angle distortion, natural shadows, fine hair detail, authentic fabric texture, and a candid social-media snapshot feel. Keep the background tidy, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no exaggerated pose, and make the image look like a real unedited photograph.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic vertical smartphone photo of a young East Asian woman with long wavy dark brown hair standing in a modern minimalist kitchen at night, photographed from about mid-thigh upward. She is centered slightly left, leaning her right hand back on the white countertop while her left hand lightly holds a lock of hair near her shoulder, facing the camera with a calm neutral expression, soft lips, natural makeup, and direct eye contact. She wears a peach fitted spaghetti-strap camisole, high-waisted dark charcoal skinny jeans with white stitching, and a delicate small gold necklace. The kitchen has glossy cream-white upper cabinets with vertical seams, a black range hood strip, a pale backsplash, a white countertop, a black gas stovetop, a covered pale green pot on the right burner, a clear plastic cooking-oil bottle at the far right, and a black built-in oven below. Use warm indoor ceiling lighting with subtle reflections on cabinets and skin, realistic phone-camera perspective, slight wide-angle distortion, natural shadows, fine hair detail, authentic fabric texture, and a candid social-media snapshot feel. Keep the background tidy, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no exaggerated pose, and make the image look like a real unedited photograph.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的竖屏手机摄影照片，画面中 一位留着深棕色长波浪卷发的年轻东亚女性 站在夜晚的现代极简主义厨房中，取景范围从大腿中部向上。她位于画面偏左中心位置，右手向后撑在白色台面上，左手轻抚肩部附近的一缕头发，面向镜头，表情平静自然，双唇柔和，妆容清透，与镜头进行眼神交流。她身穿 一件桃粉色修身细肩带吊带衫，搭配 带有白色缝线的高腰深炭灰色紧身牛仔裤，并佩戴一条精致的小金项链。厨房配有带竖向接缝的亮面奶油白色吊柜、黑色抽油烟机条、浅色防溅板、白色台面、黑色燃气灶，右侧炉头上放着一个带盖的浅绿色锅，最右侧有一瓶透明塑料装的食用油，下方嵌入黑色烤箱。采用温暖的室内顶灯，在橱柜和皮肤上形成细腻的反光，呈现真实的手机拍摄视角、轻微的广角畸变、自然的阴影、精致的头发细节、真实的织物纹理，营造出社交媒体随拍的真实感。保持背景整洁，无文字，无水印，无多余人物，无夸张姿势，使图像看起来像一张未经修饰的真实照片。
